scripts: callscore-cmo-finalizer.sh — CMO draft generation, quality gate, combined execution receipt
callscore-engagement-executor.sh — Engagement opportunity consumer with graph-owned routing
callscore-engagement-discovery.sh — Engagement opportunity discovery and packet generation
callscore-genuine-social-packet.sh — Social data packet generation with call analysis
callscore-content-quality-gate.py — Opinionated content quality gate (opinion hooks, growth mechanics, visual asset)
callscore-graph-owned-publish-invoker.sh — Graph-owned publish invoker; builds mutation inputs and invokes operating graph only
callscore-video-queue-consumer.sh — Video queue consumer (graph-owned dispatcher wrapper)
graph_owned_compliance: All scripts are parent/provider-safe: they write receipts only, never call provider tools directly. Provider mutation is delegated to operating graph nodes.
change_notes: Patched 2026-06-29: publish invoker builds schema-correct mutation inputs, complete graph context, and clean JSON/raw stdout; cmo-finalizer consumes real invoker graph result.
